titleStmt.title: SII 15.25: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 25. (B.K. No. 64 of 1926-27.) YALI-SIRŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into a wall of the Bhōgēśvara temple.

This is dated the 7th regnal year of the king, Raktākshi, Chaitra-pūrṇimā, Sunday, lunar eclipse. The only lunar eclipse in the year occurred in Śrāvaṇa. So, if Chaitra is a mistake for Śrāvaṇa, the details regularly correspond to 1144 A.D., July 16.

It registers a gift made by Perggaḍe Nāmiyaṇṇa, the Sarvādhikāri of Mahāmaṇḍalēs11vara Hermmāḍidēva of Haṭṭagāra lineage and Kāḷasēna family, for burning a perpetual lamp before the god Bhōgēśvara. The gift comprised the income derived from the cess called bīravaṇa on the betel leaves and it was entrusted to Aghōrapaṇḍita, the priest in charge of the temple.
It records another gift made by Davaḷara Sānta-gāvuṇḍa in conjunction with the Eight Gāvuṇḍas and Aṟuvattokkalu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāḷasēnavaṁsōdbhavaṁ haṭṭigāra

kāriyappa pe¨rggaḍe nāmiyaṇṇaṁgaḷ dha¨rmmacitta
rāgi © śrīmacāḷukya pratāpacakrava¨rtti jagadē
kamalladēvava¨rśada 7 neya raktākṣi saṁvatsarada cai
tra su pau¨rṇnamāse Ādivāra sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu
śrimatu bhōgēśvaradēvara naṁdādīvigegeṁdu Ā
sthānadācā¨ryarappa Aghōrapaṁḍitadēvara kā
laṁ ka¨rcci dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi tavage naḍeva bīra
vaṇavaṇavaṁ dēvara tōṁṭadeleyenitu hēṟā
daḍaṁ vanitakka hēṟigoṁdu paṇavina bīravaṇamanā
caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru . svasti samastaprasestisahi
taṁ śrīmadeṁṭugāvuḍuṁ Aṟuvattokkalmukhyavāgi
davaḷara sāntagāUṇḍaṁ biṭṭa dha¨rmamāUdeṁdaḍe śrī
bhōgēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgake Ā dēvara tōṭada darisine sōge
paṇavanācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
